commands: vp migrate --no-interactive # existing Vite+ pnpm project declared bundled tools (oxlint/oxlint-tsgolint/oxfmt/tsdown) via catalog:
cat package.json # the bundled tools are removed (vite-plus provides them) so no dangling catalog: references survive
cat pnpm-workspace.yaml # the same bundled tools are dropped from the catalog, keeping package.json and the catalog consistent
